document:
Riverlane Ops Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 60 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@riverlane.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 12 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: What refund period, in days, is listed here?
